label: Body part
description: Defines a discrete body part that can appear in a pawn body tree. Controls hit points, bleeding, skin and solid properties, damage type hit chance overrides, and surgery options.

labelShort.label: Label (short)
labelShort.description: Abbreviated label shown in compact UI contexts such as health cards.

tags.label: Tags
tags.description: BodyPartTagDef tags attached to this body part. Tags control vital-organ logic and targeting behaviour.

hitPoints.label: Hit points
hitPoints.description: Maximum hit points before this body part is destroyed.

permanentInjuryChanceFactor.label: Permanent injury chance factor
permanentInjuryChanceFactor.description: Multiplier on the probability that a healed wound leaves a permanent scar. 0 means wounds on this part never become permanent.

bleedRate.label: Bleed rate
bleedRate.description: Multiplier on bleeding severity from wounds on this part. 0 means this part does not cause bleeding.

frostbiteVulnerability.label: Frostbite vulnerability
frostbiteVulnerability.description: How quickly this part takes frostbite damage in cold environments. Higher values increase vulnerability.

skinCovered.label: Skin covered
skinCovered.description: Whether this part is covered by skin. Affects heat exchange and skin-specific conditions.

solid.label: Solid
solid.description: Whether this part is solid (bone-like). Solid parts interact differently with blunt and sharp damage.

alive.label: Alive
alive.description: Whether this part is living tissue. Non-alive parts do not bleed or become infected.

delicate.label: Delicate
delicate.description: If true, this part is treated as delicate for apparel coverage and damage calculations.

canScarify.label: Can scarify
canScarify.description: Whether this part can be scarified as an ideological ritual modification.

beautyRelated.label: Beauty related
beautyRelated.description: If true, injuries or missing state of this part affect the pawn's beauty stat.

conceptual.label: Conceptual
conceptual.description: If true, this part exists only to anchor child parts and has no hit points or physical presence.

socketed.label: Socketed
socketed.description: If true, this part can receive socketed implants or bionics.

spawnThingOnRemoved.label: Spawn thing on removed
spawnThingOnRemoved.description: ThingDef spawned on the ground when this part is surgically removed.

pawnGeneratorCanAmputate.label: Pawn generator can amputate
pawnGeneratorCanAmputate.description: If true, the pawn generator may randomly amputate this part when creating handicapped pawns.

canSuggestAmputation.label: Can suggest amputation
canSuggestAmputation.description: If true, the doctor AI may suggest amputating this part to stop a life-threatening infection.

forceAlwaysRemovable.label: Force always removable
forceAlwaysRemovable.description: If true, this part always appears in the operation list for amputation regardless of normal removability rules.

hitChanceFactors.label: Hit chance factors
hitChanceFactors.description: Per-damage-type multipliers on the probability that an attack targets this body part. Each entry is a <li> with a <key> (DamageDef name) and a <value> (float multiplier).

destroyableByDamage.label: Destroyable by damage
destroyableByDamage.description: Whether this part can be permanently destroyed by damage. False means it can only be wounded, not destroyed.

canBeVacuumBurnt.label: Can be vacuum burnt
canBeVacuumBurnt.description: Whether vacuum exposure can burn this body part.

removeRecipeLabelOverride.label: Remove recipe label override
removeRecipeLabelOverride.description: Custom label for the removal or amputation recipe, overriding the auto-generated name.

executionPartPriority.label: Execution part priority
executionPartPriority.description: Priority for targeting this part during executions. Higher values make this part more likely to be targeted.
